This initiative, part of a broader effort to strengthen ties with the Trump administration, seeks to diversify Pakistan's options and counterbalance China's influence.]]></description><link>https://timesofindia.indiatimes.com/world/pakistan/pakistan-pitches-port-on-arabian-sea-to-us-eye-on-minerals-hub-development-report/articleshow/124306683.cms</link><guid>https://timesofindia.indiatimes.com/world/pakistan/pakistan-pitches-port-on-arabian-sea-to-us-eye-on-minerals-hub-development-report/articleshow/124306683.cms</guid><pubDate>Sat, 04 Oct 2025 17:05:38 +0530</pubDate><dc:creator>TOI WORLD DESK</dc:creator><enclosure type="image/jpeg" length="1226360" url="https://static.toiimg.com/photo/msid-124307020,imgsize-1226360.cms"/></item><item><title>US govt shuts down: Embassy in India gives update; scheduled services will..</title><description><![CDATA[The US government has shut down for the first time in nearly seven years after Republicans and Democrats failed to agree on federal funding. Despite this, the US Embassy in India confirmed that scheduled visa and passport services will continue. The embassy's X account will only provide urgent safety and security updates during this period.]]></description><link>https://timesofindia.indiatimes.com/technology/tech-news/us-government-shuts-down-us-embassy-in-india-gives-important-update-scheduled-passport-and-visa-services-will/articleshow/124293569.cms</link><guid>https://timesofindia.indiatimes.com/technology/tech-news/us-government-shuts-down-us-embassy-in-india-gives-important-update-scheduled-passport-and-visa-services-will/articleshow/124293569.cms</guid><pubDate>Fri, 03 Oct 2025 20:06:16 +0530</pubDate><dc:creator>TOI TECH DESK</dc:creator><enclosure type="image/jpeg" length="59156" url="https://static.toiimg.com/photo/msid-124293562,imgsize-59156.cms"/></item><item><title>Indian student shot dead in US: Killed by 'miscreants'; was working at gas station</title><description><![CDATA[A 26-year-old Hyderabad student, Chandrashekar Pole, was tragically shot dead by an unidentified gunman at a Dallas gas station where he worked part-time. Pole had moved to the US in 2023 for higher studies, completing his master's degree six months ago. BRS MLA T Harish Rao met the bereaved family and demanded that the Telangana government make arrangements to bring Pole’s mortal remains back to his hometown.]]></description><link>https://timesofindia.indiatimes.com/world/us/hyderabad-student-shot-dead-in-us-killed-by-miscreants-was-working-at-gas-station/articleshow/124307443.cms</link><guid>https://timesofindia.indiatimes.com/world/us/hyderabad-student-shot-dead-in-us-killed-by-miscreants-was-working-at-gas-station/articleshow/124307443.cms</guid><pubDate>Sat, 04 Oct 2025 18:04:12 +0530</pubDate><dc:creator>TOI NEWS DESK</dc:creator><enclosure type="image/jpeg" length="88896" url="https://static.toiimg.com/photo/msid-124307693,imgsize-88896.cms"/></item><item><title>'Biggest honour': Gill's first reaction on becoming ODI captain; shares World Cup vision</title><description><![CDATA[Indian selectors have removed Rohit Sharma from ODI captaincy, appointing young opener Shubman Gill as the new leader with the 2027 World Cup firmly in sight. This strategic move aims to groom Gill as India’s all-format captain, while Rohit Sharma and Virat Kohli retain their places in the squad for the upcoming Australia series.]]></description><link>https://timesofindia.indiatimes.com/sports/cricket/india-vs-australia/biggest-honour-to-lead-india-shubman-gills-first-reaction-on-becoming-odi-captain-shares-world-cup-vision/articleshow/124309055.cms</link><guid>https://timesofindia.indiatimes.com/sports/cricket/india-vs-australia/biggest-honour-to-lead-india-shubman-gills-first-reaction-on-becoming-odi-captain-shares-world-cup-vision/articleshow/124309055.cms</guid><pubDate>Sat, 04 Oct 2025 20:02:47 +0530</pubDate><dc:creator>TOI SPORTS DESK</dc:creator><enclosure type="image/jpeg" length="42756" url="https://static.toiimg.com/photo/msid-124309099,imgsize-42756.cms"/></item><item><title>'Playing at home without Ashwin feels different': Jadeja lauds India's spin options</title><description><![CDATA[Ravindra Jadeja starred in India's crushing Test victory over West Indies, scoring 104 not out and taking 4/54. He expressed missing retired spin partner Ravichandran Ashwin, while also discussing the team's emerging spin talent and his own batting resurgence due to mindset and fitness adjustments.]]></description><link>https://timesofindia.indiatimes.com/sports/cricket/india-vs-west-indies/playing-at-home-without-ashwin-feels-different-jadeja-on-indias-dominance-fitness-and-future-stars/articleshow/124310234.cms</link><guid>https://timesofindia.indiatimes.com/sports/cricket/india-vs-west-indies/playing-at-home-without-ashwin-feels-different-jadeja-on-indias-dominance-fitness-and-future-stars/articleshow/124310234.cms</guid><pubDate>Sat, 04 Oct 2025 22:06:48 +0530</pubDate><dc:creator>TOI SPORTS DESK</dc:creator><enclosure type="image/jpeg" length="64040" url="https://static.toiimg.com/photo/msid-124310247,imgsize-64040.cms"/></item><item><title>‘English did not rule India’: Elon Musk replies to viral post; sparks outrage</title><description><![CDATA[Elon Musk's 'thinking face' emoji reaction to a controversial X post, which argued that British rule in India wasn't colonization if Indians in England become English, sparked widespread outrage. Users heavily criticized Musk and the post's flawed logic, emphasizing the stark difference between legal immigration and violent colonial subjugation, and reminding him of historical atrocities.]]></description><link>https://timesofindia.indiatimes.com/technology/tech-news/tesla-ceo-elon-musks-one-word-reply-to-viral-post-on-british-rule-in-india-sparks-outrage/articleshow/124304345.cms</link><guid>https://timesofindia.indiatimes.com/technology/tech-news/tesla-ceo-elon-musks-one-word-reply-to-viral-post-on-british-rule-in-india-sparks-outrage/articleshow/124304345.cms</guid><pubDate>Sat, 04 Oct 2025 13:12:14 +0530</pubDate><dc:creator>TOI TECH DESK</dc:creator><enclosure type="image/jpeg" length="20724" url="https://static.toiimg.com/photo/msid-124304788,imgsize-20724.cms"/></item><item><title>Hyderabad student killed in US: 800+ Indian student deaths since 2018; US leads the list</title><description><![CDATA[A Hyderabad student, Chandrashekar Pole, was fatally shot in Dallas while working part-time, highlighting ongoing safety concerns for Indian students abroad. Data from the Ministry of External Affairs, reported by Dataful, shows 842 Indian student deaths overseas between 2018 and 2024, with the US leading at 141 deaths. Most fatalities were due to medical causes, suicides, and accidents. The data calls for urgent action from policymakers, universities, and families to improve student safety and support.]]></description><link>https://timesofindia.indiatimes.com/education/news/hyderabad-student-killed-in-us-800-indian-student-deaths-abroad-since-2018-america-leads-the-toll/articleshow/124310003.cms</link><guid>https://timesofindia.indiatimes.com/education/news/hyderabad-student-killed-in-us-800-indian-student-deaths-abroad-since-2018-america-leads-the-toll/articleshow/124310003.cms</guid><pubDate>Sat, 04 Oct 2025 21:37:26 +0530</pubDate><dc:creator>SANJAY SHARMA</dc:creator><enclosure type="image/jpeg" length="37772" url="https://static.toiimg.com/photo/msid-124310016,imgsize-37772.cms"/></item><item><title>‘Swadeshi Campaign’: Govt push for Indian textiles; demand 'to hit' $250 bn by 2030</title><description><![CDATA[The Ministry of Textiles has launched the 'Swadeshi Campaign' to significantly boost domestic demand for Indian handloom, handicrafts, and textile products. This initiative targets urban youth and Gen Z, aiming to reposition Indian textiles as symbols of pride and heritage.]]></description><link>https://timesofindia.indiatimes.com/business/india-business/swadeshi-campaign-launch-govt-pushes-to-boost-demand-for-indian-textiles-domestic-market-demand-expected-at-250-billion-by-2030/articleshow/124310157.cms</link><guid>https://timesofindia.indiatimes.com/business/india-business/swadeshi-campaign-launch-govt-pushes-to-boost-demand-for-indian-textiles-domestic-market-demand-expected-at-250-billion-by-2030/articleshow/124310157.cms</guid><pubDate>Sat, 04 Oct 2025 22:05:26 +0530</pubDate><dc:creator>TOI BUSINESS DESK</dc:creator><enclosure type="image/jpeg" length="1507745" url="https://static.toiimg.com/photo/msid-124310239,imgsize-1507745.cms"/></item><item><title>UK PM to visit India: Focus on 'Vision 2035'; Starmer's 1st official trip</title><description><![CDATA[UK Prime Minister Keir Starmer will visit India on October 8-9, 2025, at PM Modi's invitation for his first official trip. The leaders will review the India-UK Comprehensive Strategic Partnership under 'Vision 2035' and attend Mumbai's Global Fintech Fest.]]></description><link>https://timesofindia.indiatimes.com/india/vision-2035-uk-pm-keir-starmer-to-visit-india-on-oct-8-9-india-uk-strategic-partnership-in-focus/articleshow/124308689.cms</link><guid>https://timesofindia.indiatimes.com/india/vision-2035-uk-pm-keir-starmer-to-visit-india-on-oct-8-9-india-uk-strategic-partnership-in-focus/articleshow/124308689.cms</guid><pubDate>Sat, 04 Oct 2025 19:25:50 +0530</pubDate><dc:creator>TOI NEWS DESK</dc:creator><enclosure type="image/jpeg" length="1009469" url="https://static.toiimg.com/photo/msid-124308680,imgsize-1009469.cms"/></item><item><title>US Army warns: Military network at ‘very high risk’; sends memo to these companies</title><description><![CDATA[The US Army's chief technology officer issued a memo labeling the new NGC2 battlefield communications network, developed by Palantir and Anduril, as "very high risk" due to fundamental security flaws. Concerns include uncontrolled data access, unmonitored user actions, and unverified software security, potentially allowing adversaries persistent access and misuse of classified information.]]></description><link>https://timesofindia.indiatimes.com/technology/tech-news/us-army-sends-memo-to-two-of-the-biggest-silicon-valley-companies-memo-says-should-be-treated-as-very-high-risk/articleshow/124293220.cms</link><guid>https://timesofindia.indiatimes.com/technology/tech-news/us-army-sends-memo-to-two-of-the-biggest-silicon-valley-companies-memo-says-should-be-treated-as-very-high-risk/articleshow/124293220.cms</guid><pubDate>Fri, 03 Oct 2025 19:41:29 +0530</pubDate><dc:creator>TOI TECH DESK</dc:creator><enclosure type="image/jpeg" length="55012" url="https://static.toiimg.com/photo/msid-124293219,imgsize-55012.cms"/></item><item><title>China's K visa faces online backlash: Locals vent on Weibo; here's why</title><description><![CDATA[China's new K visa, aimed at attracting young international STEM graduates without a prior job offer, is drawing significant criticism. Netizens are concerned about its timing amidst high domestic unemployment and a large influx of new graduates, fearing it favors foreign talent and lacks robust vetting processes. The visa's launch has been delayed.]]></description><link>https://timesofindia.indiatimes.com/world/china/chinas-k-visa-faces-online-backlash-locals-vent-on-weibo-heres-why/articleshow/124309445.cms</link><guid>https://timesofindia.indiatimes.com/world/china/chinas-k-visa-faces-online-backlash-locals-vent-on-weibo-heres-why/articleshow/124309445.cms</guid><pubDate>Sat, 04 Oct 2025 20:40:13 +0530</pubDate><dc:creator>TOI WORLD DESK</dc:creator><enclosure type="image/jpeg" length="305202" url="https://static.toiimg.com/photo/msid-124309510,imgsize-305202.cms"/></item><item><title>Kyren Lacy controversy: Lawyer claims ex-LSU WR wrongly blamed in fatal crash</title><description><![CDATA[Former LSU player Kyren Lacy's suicide, ahead of negligent homicide charges, sparks controversy. His attorney, Matt Ory, challenges the Louisiana State Police investigation into a fatal accident. New surveillance footage reportedly shows Lacy was back in his lane before impact, contradicting official accounts. Ory cites inconsistencies and missing witness testimony, suggesting evidence doesn't support Lacy's culpability, deepening the tragedy.]]></description><link>https://timesofindia.indiatimes.com/sports/nfl/news/controversy-deepens-police-under-fire-as-attorney-claims-former-lsu-wide-receiver-kyren-lacy-wrongly-blamed-in-deadly-accident/articleshow/124300432.cms</link><guid>https://timesofindia.indiatimes.com/sports/nfl/news/controversy-deepens-police-under-fire-as-attorney-claims-former-lsu-wide-receiver-kyren-lacy-wrongly-blamed-in-deadly-accident/articleshow/124300432.cms</guid><pubDate>Sat, 04 Oct 2025 05:28:27 +0530</pubDate><dc:creator>BARSHA DUTTA</dc:creator><enclosure type="image/jpeg" length="30924" url="https://static.toiimg.com/photo/msid-124300432,imgsize-30924.cms"/></item><item><title>Female admissions at IITs stuck at 20%: Policy met its quota; deeper barriers remain</title><description><![CDATA[Despite policy interventions like the Supernumerary Seats Scheme, female enrolment in IIT BTech programmes remains stagnant at around 20% as of 2025. While the number of women admitted has risen in absolute terms, the proportional share has seen minimal growth since 2020. Social, cultural, and institutional barriers—including safety concerns, high coaching costs, and confidence gaps—continue to limit access. Data over five years highlights the need for deeper reforms beyond reserved seats.]]></description><link>https://timesofindia.indiatimes.com/education/news/why-female-admissions-at-iits-are-stuck-at-20-and-whats-really-holding-progress-back/articleshow/124308855.cms</link><guid>https://timesofindia.indiatimes.com/education/news/why-female-admissions-at-iits-are-stuck-at-20-and-whats-really-holding-progress-back/articleshow/124308855.cms</guid><pubDate>Sat, 04 Oct 2025 19:43:21 +0530</pubDate><dc:creator>TOI Education</dc:creator><enclosure type="image/jpeg" length="162079" url="https://static.toiimg.com/photo/msid-124308906,imgsize-162079.cms"/></item><item><title>Gisele Bündchen finds healing in nature and family as ex-husband Tom Brady watches afar</title><description><![CDATA[Gisele Bündchen, 45, embraces a new chapter, sharing glimpses of her seven-month-old baby boy, life with Joaquim Valente, and her deep connection to nature. Her recent Instagram post highlighted a tender photo of her newborn and a message of mindfulness, showing her grounded lifestyle in Brazil focused on family and healing.]]></description><link>https://timesofindia.indiatimes.com/sports/nfl/news/something-in-me-begins-to-heal-gisele-bndchen-finds-peace-in-nature-and-family-while-tom-brady-watches-from-a-distance/articleshow/124245395.cms</link><guid>https://timesofindia.indiatimes.com/sports/nfl/news/something-in-me-begins-to-heal-gisele-bndchen-finds-peace-in-nature-and-family-while-tom-brady-watches-from-a-distance/articleshow/124245395.cms</guid><pubDate>Wed, 01 Oct 2025 05:50:00 +0530</pubDate><dc:creator>BARSHA DUTTA</dc:creator><enclosure type="image/jpeg" length="32302" url="https://static.toiimg.com/photo/msid-124245421,imgsize-32302.cms"/></item><item><title>Giants star Malik Nabers slams 'broken justice system' LSU teammate's tragic death</title><description><![CDATA[Giants rookie Malik Nabers expressed anguish over former LSU teammate Kyren Lacy's tragic death by suicide, which occurred a day before a grand jury hearing. Lacy faced negligent homicide charges, but his attorney claimed new evidence showed innocence. Nabers criticized the justice system and media for destroying reputations before facts are known.]]></description><link>https://timesofindia.indiatimes.com/sports/nfl/news/giants-star-malik-nabers-slams-broken-justice-system-in-emotional-post-after-lsu-teammate-kyren-lacys-tragic-death-ahead-of-grand-jury-hearing/articleshow/124303869.cms</link><guid>https://timesofindia.indiatimes.com/sports/nfl/news/giants-star-malik-nabers-slams-broken-justice-system-in-emotional-post-after-lsu-teammate-kyren-lacys-tragic-death-ahead-of-grand-jury-hearing/articleshow/124303869.cms</guid><pubDate>Sat, 04 Oct 2025 15:20:00 +0530</pubDate><dc:creator>GLOBAL SPORTS DESK</dc:creator><enclosure type="image/jpeg" length="101640" url="https://static.toiimg.com/photo/msid-124303875,imgsize-101640.cms"/></item><item><title>Stephen A. Smith on Shedeur Sanders’ 'silence' amid Browns QB drama</title><description><![CDATA[Shedeur Sanders made headlines in Cleveland on October 1, 2025. He remained silent during a press conference. Stephen A. Smith defended his actions, calling judgment unfair. Cam Newton discussed Sanders' brand value for the Browns. Both analysts agreed his true test would come only when he steps onto the field.]]></description><link>https://timesofindia.indiatimes.com/sports/nfl/news/i-dont-consider-him-stephen-a-smith-speaks-out-on-shedeur-sanders-mute-media-act-amid-cleveland-browns-qb-drama/articleshow/124278916.cms</link><guid>https://timesofindia.indiatimes.com/sports/nfl/news/i-dont-consider-him-stephen-a-smith-speaks-out-on-shedeur-sanders-mute-media-act-amid-cleveland-browns-qb-drama/articleshow/124278916.cms</guid><pubDate>Fri, 03 Oct 2025 02:54:18 +0530</pubDate><dc:creator>SEHJAL GUPTA</dc:creator><enclosure type="image/jpeg" length="1438836" url="https://static.toiimg.com/photo/msid-124278914,imgsize-1438836.cms"/></item><item><title>'You taught India what it takes to win': Dinesh Karthik's heartfelt tribute to Rohit Sharma</title><description><![CDATA[Dinesh Karthik lauded Rohit Sharma's impactful ODI captaincy, praising his tactical brilliance and aggressive leadership that led India to two ICC trophies in 2024 and a strong winning record. However, selectors removed Rohit, appointing Shubman Gill as the new ODI captain for the Australia tour, with an eye on the 2027 World Cup.]]></description><link>https://timesofindia.indiatimes.com/sports/cricket/news/you-taught-india-how-to-win-dinesh-karthik-pays-heartfelt-tribute-to-captain-rohit-sharma/articleshow/124309867.cms</link><guid>https://timesofindia.indiatimes.com/sports/cricket/news/you-taught-india-how-to-win-dinesh-karthik-pays-heartfelt-tribute-to-captain-rohit-sharma/articleshow/124309867.cms</guid><pubDate>Sat, 04 Oct 2025 21:20:41 +0530</pubDate><dc:creator>TOI SPORTS DESK</dc:creator><enclosure type="image/jpeg" length="93798" url="https://static.toiimg.com/photo/msid-124309897,imgsize-93798.cms"/></item><item><title>Pak buckles in PoK: Sharif govt, protesters sign pact - what's in the deal?</title><description><![CDATA[Protests in Pakistan-occupied Kashmir concluded after an agreement. The Pakistan government and protestors signed a 25-point charter. This followed days of violence and unrest in the region. The deal includes compensation for victims and significant developmental measures. Key provisions cover education, health, and electricity improvements. Administrative reforms and infrastructure projects are also part of the agreement.]]></description><link>https://timesofindia.indiatimes.com/world/pakistan/38-point-charter-pakistan-government-reaches-agreement-with-protestors-on-25-points-negotiations-include-infra-trade-reforms/articleshow/124303784.cms</link><guid>https://timesofindia.indiatimes.com/world/pakistan/38-point-charter-pakistan-government-reaches-agreement-with-protestors-on-25-points-negotiations-include-infra-trade-reforms/articleshow/124303784.cms</guid><pubDate>Sat, 04 Oct 2025 12:34:49 +0530</pubDate><dc:creator>TOI WORLD DESK</dc:creator><enclosure type="image/jpeg" length="941335" url="https://static.toiimg.com/photo/msid-124303802,imgsize-941335.cms"/></item><item><title>'Trying to steal Jan Nayak title': PM slams Rahul; blames RJD for Bihar's woes</title><description><![CDATA[Prime Minister Modi inaugurated significant education and skilling projects in Bihar, including the Jan Nayak Karpoori Thakur Skill University. This new drug targets hormone-resistant tumors by blocking estrogen receptors, reducing the risk of disease progression or death by 33-38%. Inluriyo offers a convenient pill alternative, bringing new hope to patients.]]></description><link>https://timesofindia.indiatimes.com/life-style/health-fitness/health-news/ray-of-hope-for-advanced-breast-cancer-patients-us-approves-new-oral-drug-inluriyo/articleshow/124298590.cms</link><guid>https://timesofindia.indiatimes.com/life-style/health-fitness/health-news/ray-of-hope-for-advanced-breast-cancer-patients-us-approves-new-oral-drug-inluriyo/articleshow/124298590.cms</guid><pubDate>Sat, 04 Oct 2025 03:37:36 +0530</pubDate><dc:creator>TOI LIFESTYLE DESK</dc:creator><enclosure type="image/jpeg" length="22978" url="https://static.toiimg.com/photo/msid-124298588,imgsize-22978.cms"/></item><item><title>Rohit Sharma, Virat Kohli fit and key for India: Ajit Agarkar</title><description><![CDATA[BCCI chief selector Ajit Agarkar confirmed Shubman Gill as India's new ODI captain, consolidating leadership across formats. Rohit is expected to open with Gill, balancing experience with fresh leadership.]]></description><link>https://timesofindia.indiatimes.com/sports/cricket/india-vs-australia/rohit-sharma-virat-kohli-fit-and-key-for-india-ajit-agarkar/articleshow/124306781.cms</link><guid>https://timesofindia.indiatimes.com/sports/cricket/india-vs-australia/rohit-sharma-virat-kohli-fit-and-key-for-india-ajit-agarkar/articleshow/124306781.cms</guid><pubDate>Sat, 04 Oct 2025 16:45:44 +0530</pubDate><dc:creator>TOI SPORTS DESK</dc:creator><enclosure type="image/jpeg" length="55040" url="https://static.toiimg.com/photo/msid-124306803,imgsize-55040.cms"/></item><item><title>Jeff Bezos makes bold prediction: 'The next data centres will be built in space'</title><description><![CDATA[Jeff Bezos predicts space-based data centers within 10-20 years, leveraging uninterrupted solar power for unmatched efficiency. These orbital facilities would revolutionize AI training and cloud computing, overcoming terrestrial limitations. He believes technological advances will make them feasible despite high costs, comparing AI's boom to the internet's early surge.]]></description><link>https://timesofindia.indiatimes.com/science/jeff-bezos-makes-bold-prediction-the-next-data-centres-will-be-built-in-space/articleshow/124306799.cms</link><guid>https://timesofindia.indiatimes.com/science/jeff-bezos-makes-bold-prediction-the-next-data-centres-will-be-built-in-space/articleshow/124306799.cms</guid><pubDate>Sat, 04 Oct 2025 16:48:31 +0530</pubDate><dc:creator>TOI SCIENCE DESK</dc:creator><enclosure type="image/jpeg" length="27914" url="https://static.toiimg.com/photo/msid-124306819,imgsize-27914.cms"/></item><item><title>'Practically impossible to avoid': Agarkar on Gill taking over ODI reins from Rohit</title><description><![CDATA[Shubman Gill has been named India's ODI captain, replacing Rohit Sharma, as part of a strategic move to consolidate leadership across formats. Chief selector Ajit Agarkar cited long-term planning for the 2027 World Cup and the impracticality of having three different captains. Gill, already Test captain, also serve as T20I vice-captain under Suryakumar Yadav.]]></description><link>https://timesofindia.indiatimes.com/sports/cricket/india-vs-australia/practically-impossible-to-have-three-captains-ajit-agarkar-on-shubman-gill-taking-over-odi-reins-from-rohit-sharma/articleshow/124306081.cms</link><guid>https://timesofindia.indiatimes.com/sports/cricket/india-vs-australia/practically-impossible-to-have-three-captains-ajit-agarkar-on-shubman-gill-taking-over-odi-reins-from-rohit-sharma/articleshow/124306081.cms</guid><pubDate>Sat, 04 Oct 2025 15:52:23 +0530</pubDate><dc:creator>TOI SPORTS DESK</dc:creator><enclosure type="image/jpeg" length="42496" url="https://static.toiimg.com/photo/msid-124306079,imgsize-42496.cms"/></item><item><title>Monk robes to veg food: Delhi 'godman' makes demands in jail; charges added to FIR</title><description><![CDATA[Self-styled godman Swami Chaitanyananda was remanded to 14 days judicial custody by a Delhi court over sexual harassment allegations at a management institute. Police added a charge for threatening a woman after the case was registered. His counsel sought preservation of evidence and specific provisions for his stay, on which the court sought police response.]]></description><link>https://timesofindia.indiatimes.com/city/delhi/harassment-accused-in-14-day-judicial-custody/articleshow/124296816.cms</link><guid>https://timesofindia.indiatimes.com/city/delhi/harassment-accused-in-14-day-judicial-custody/articleshow/124296816.cms</guid><pubDate>Sat, 04 Oct 2025 14:32:16 +0530</pubDate><dc:creator>TNN</dc:creator><enclosure type="image/jpeg" length="1907273" url="https://static.toiimg.com/photo/msid-124301668,imgsize-1907273.cms"/></item><item><title>Emma Raducanu’s IG nod to Taylor Swift’s ‘The Life of a Showgirl’</title><description><![CDATA[Emma Raducanu publicly supported Taylor Swift's new album, "The Life of a Showgirl," on Instagram on October 3, 2025, amidst its mixed reception. This gesture followed Raducanu's mixed 2025 tennis season, which included recent losses but also a strong semifinal performance. Her musical interests connect her with fans beyond the court.]]></description><link>https://timesofindia.indiatimes.com/sports/international-sports/emma-raducanu-surprises-fans-with-instagram-reaction-to-taylor-swift-album-the-life-of-a-showgirl/articleshow/124300464.cms</link><guid>https://timesofindia.indiatimes.com/sports/international-sports/emma-raducanu-surprises-fans-with-instagram-reaction-to-taylor-swift-album-the-life-of-a-showgirl/articleshow/124300464.cms</guid><pubDate>Sat, 04 Oct 2025 05:38:17 +0530</pubDate><dc:creator>SEHJAL GUPTA</dc:creator><enclosure type="image/jpeg" length="1346001" url="https://static.toiimg.com/photo/msid-124300454,imgsize-1346001.cms"/></item><item><title>Bihar polls by Oct-end? EC holds all-party meet; suggestions on dates, phases</title><description><![CDATA[The Election Commission met political parties on Saturday. They discussed Bihar assembly polls. Parties urged polls after the Chhath festival. They also asked for fewer phases. Reforms like voter cap and Form 17C were welcomed. Janata Dal (United) sought a single-phase election. BJP asked agents to collect Form 17C. Election dates will be announced soon.]]></description><link>https://timesofindia.indiatimes.com/india/bihar-assembly-polls-likely-post-chhath-ec-holds-all-party-meet-jdu-calls-for-single-phase-voting/articleshow/124305711.cms</link><guid>https://timesofindia.indiatimes.com/india/bihar-assembly-polls-likely-post-chhath-ec-holds-all-party-meet-jdu-calls-for-single-phase-voting/articleshow/124305711.cms</guid><pubDate>Sat, 04 Oct 2025 15:22:49 +0530</pubDate><dc:creator>TOI NEWS DESK</dc:creator><enclosure type="image/jpeg" length="1210827" url="https://static.toiimg.com/photo/msid-124305710,imgsize-1210827.cms"/></item><item><title>‘Op Gaanjaney’: How ATS tracked ex-NSG commando in 200kg drug bust; kingpin had political ambitions</title><description><![CDATA[Rajasthan ATS apprehended former NSG commando Bajrang Singh, wanted in a 200kg ganja smuggling case. Singh, who served in the 26/11 Mumbai operation and retired in 2021, became a narcotics kingpin, leveraging local connections after failed political ambitions. He was tracked for two months using technical intelligence and informers, culminating in his arrest under 'Operation Gaanjaney'.]]></description><link>https://timesofindia.indiatimes.com/city/jaipur/ex-nsg-commando-held-in-200kg-ganja-smuggling-case/articleshow/124297371.cms</link><guid>https://timesofindia.indiatimes.com/city/jaipur/ex-nsg-commando-held-in-200kg-ganja-smuggling-case/articleshow/124297371.cms</guid><pubDate>Sat, 04 Oct 2025 03:31:08 +0530</pubDate><dc:creator>TNN</dc:creator><enclosure type="image/jpeg" length="1116115" url="https://static.toiimg.com/photo/msid-124301708,imgsize-1116115.cms"/></item><item><title>First major legal challenge hits Trump’s $100K H-1B visa overhaul - Here’s what to know</title><description><![CDATA[A coalition of unions, educators, and advocacy groups has filed the first major lawsuit against President Trump’s $100,000 H-1B visa fee, calling it unlawful and harmful to US industries. Filed in California federal court, the case challenges presidential authority, citing risks to innovation, healthcare, and education. The outcome could reshape immigration policy and global talent flow.]]></description><link>https://timesofindia.indiatimes.com/education/news/unprecedented-unjustified-and-unlawful-first-major-legal-challenge-hits-trumps-100k-h-1b-visa-overhaul/articleshow/124300996.cms</link><guid>https://timesofindia.indiatimes.com/education/news/unprecedented-unjustified-and-unlawful-first-major-legal-challenge-hits-trumps-100k-h-1b-visa-overhaul/articleshow/124300996.cms</guid><pubDate>Sat, 04 Oct 2025 07:47:49 +0530</pubDate><dc:creator>TOI Education</dc:creator><enclosure type="image/jpeg" length="46378" url="https://static.toiimg.com/photo/msid-124301070,imgsize-46378.cms"/></item><item><title>Railway station targeted: Russia hits Ukrainian passenger train; at least 30 wounded</title><description><![CDATA[]]></description><link>https://timesofindia.indiatimes.com/world/europe/railway-station-targeted-russia-hits-ukrainian-passenger-train-casualties-feared/articleshow/124305759.cms</link><guid>https://timesofindia.indiatimes.com/world/europe/railway-station-targeted-russia-hits-ukrainian-passenger-train-casualties-feared/articleshow/124305759.cms</guid><pubDate>Sat, 04 Oct 2025 15:33:46 +0530</pubDate><dc:creator>TOI WORLD DESK</dc:creator><enclosure type="image/jpeg" length="877466" url="https://static.toiimg.com/photo/msid-124305842,imgsize-877466.cms"/></item><item><title>Sean Combs case: Meet Arun Subramanian? Indian-origin judge who sentenced ‘Diddy’ to 4 yrs in jail</title><description><![CDATA[District Judge Arun Subramanian sentenced Sean “Diddy” Combs to 50 months in prison and a $500,000 fine for prostitution-related offenses, citing his history of violence. Subramanian, a 45-year-old Indian-origin judge appointed by President Biden, earned praise for his measured yet firm handling of the high-profile trial, maintaining decorum amidst intense public scrutiny.]]></description><link>https://timesofindia.indiatimes.com/world/us/sean-combs-case-who-is-arun-subramanian-indian-origin-judge-sentenced-diddy-to-50-months-in-prison/articleshow/124301597.cms</link><guid>https://timesofindia.indiatimes.com/world/us/sean-combs-case-who-is-arun-subramanian-indian-origin-judge-sentenced-diddy-to-50-months-in-prison/articleshow/124301597.cms</guid><pubDate>Sat, 04 Oct 2025 09:13:40 +0530</pubDate><dc:creator>TOI WORLD DESK</dc:creator><enclosure type="image/jpeg" length="319330" url="https://static.toiimg.com/photo/msid-124301657,imgsize-319330.cms"/></item></channel></rss>

      <description><![CDATA[The retail-to-total deposit ratio improved to 71.4%, compared with 68.2% in the previous quarter, while the bulk-to-total term deposit ratio declined to 39.8% from 43.6%.       <description><![CDATA[Hindustan Zinc’s revenue growth was underpinned by firmer zinc prices on the London Metal Exchange and improved silver sales, which also supported margin expansion during the quarter.     <item>
      <title><![CDATA[EU wants to join India’s economic boom but wary of one-sided trade deal: Director of Eurointelligence]]></title>
      <link><![CDATA[https://www.cnbctv18.com/economy/eu-india-trade-deal-economic-growth-opportunities-wolfgang-munchau-19702279.htm]]></link>
      <description><![CDATA[Europe sees India as a key growth partner, but past experiences with trade imbalances make Brussels cautious. Wolfgang Munchau of Eurointelligence says India’s strong import demand and ambitious growth targets make it an attractive market, yet negotiations must avoid one-sided outcomes.]]></description>
      <pubDate><![CDATA[Fri, 3 Oct 2025 22:55:15 +0530]]></pubDate>
      <dc:creator>Swapnil Deshpande</dc:creator>
